title: On Air Light
description: Displays an ON AIR sign on the matrix, controlled remotely via MQTT or Home Assistant.

default_label.title: Sign Text
default_label.description: Text shown on the display when activated. Can be overridden per-message by sending JSON over MQTT.

font_path.title: Font
font_path.description: Path to a TTF font file relative to the LEDMatrix root, e.g. assets/fonts/PressStart2P-Regular.ttf. Leave blank to use the default font (auto-sized to 80% of display height).

font_size.title: Font Size (px)
font_size.description: Font height in pixels when a custom Font path is set. Set to 0 to auto-size to 80% of the display height.

mqtt_host.title: Broker Address
mqtt_host.description: Hostname or IP of your MQTT broker — usually the same address as your Home Assistant instance.

mqtt_username.title: Username
mqtt_username.description: MQTT broker username. Leave blank if your broker does not require authentication.

mqtt_password.title: Password
mqtt_password.description: MQTT broker password. Leave blank if your broker does not require authentication.

command_topic.title: Command Topic
command_topic.description: The plugin subscribes to this topic. Publish ON to activate or OFF to deactivate. Also accepts JSON for per-message label and color overrides.

state_topic.title: State Topic
state_topic.description: The plugin publishes ON or OFF here after each state change. Use this as the state_topic in your Home Assistant MQTT switch to keep the HA toggle in sync.

ha_discovery.title: Enable Home Assistant Auto-Discovery
ha_discovery.description: When enabled, the plugin announces itself to Home Assistant via MQTT discovery. HA will automatically create a device with switch, label sensor, and connectivity entities — no configuration.yaml entry needed.

discovery_prefix.title: HA Discovery Prefix
discovery_prefix.description: The MQTT topic prefix your HA MQTT integration listens on. Leave as 'homeassistant' unless you changed it in HA.

device_name.title: Device Name in Home Assistant
device_name.description: How this device appears under Settings → Devices & Services → MQTT in Home Assistant.

display_duration.title: Display Duration (seconds)
display_duration.description: How long the sign stays on screen each rotation cycle while active.
